news.t: U.S. Natural Gas Futures Inch Down in Early Trading
BMO Announces Upcoming Reverse Splits of Two Series of its Exchange Traded Notes (NYSE Arca: GDXD and FNGD)

holdings.infoBox: FNGD is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 18.41%, Broadcom at 10.47%, Alphabet at 10.12%, Apple at 10.09%, and NVIDIA at 9.85%.

overview.description: The MicroSectors FANG+ Index - 3X Inverse Leveraged ETN (FNGD) is an exchange-traded note that is based on the NYSE FANG+ index. The fund provides 300% inverse exposure to the daily price movements of an index of technology and consumer discretionary companies. The note uses derivatives to achieve its -3x exposure. FNGD was launched on Jan 25, 2018 and is issued by REX Microsectors.

data.title: U.S. Natural Gas Futures Inch Down in Early Trading
data.text: U.S. natural gas futures were modestly lower as a cooler weather outlook for the second half of June crimped demand expectations.
